task.title: Create per-compiler KB files and feedback compiler skill
task.summary: TASK-048: Per-compiler KB files and feedback compiler skill created.

goal.outcome: Each compiler has its own KB spec file under .codewiki/kb/system/compilers/ and the feedback compiler has a dedicated codewiki-feedback SKILL.md file.
acceptance: feedback.md KB file exists describing feedback compiler responsibilities
documentation.md KB file exists describing documentation compiler responsibilities
implementation.md KB file exists describing implementation compiler responsibilities
validation-gateway.md KB file exists describing validation gateway responsibilities
codewiki-feedback/SKILL.md exists as dedicated feedback compiler skill
Lint warning for missing skills/codewiki-feedback is resolved
non_goals: Change compiler logic or tool implementations
